message:
feat(process): add command builder, I/O config, and output capture

Close the depth gap between upstream process.rs (38 pub fns) and our
C process module (was 8 API functions, now 22):

Command builder: asx_process_command with program, args, env vars,
env_clear, env_remove, current_dir, stdin/stdout/stderr mode config
(inherit/piped/null), and kill_on_drop flag.

I/O configuration: ASX_PROCESS_STDIO_INHERIT/PIPED/NULL modes for
stdin, stdout, and stderr.

Output capture: asx_process_wait_with_output blocks until exit and
returns exit_code + success flag + captured stdout/stderr buffers.

New queries: asx_process_id, asx_process_exited_successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
